expectations.evidence: File saved as '01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs-actionables.md' (single dash, not the '--' separator the skill's naming convention requires).

expectations.text: Every File path named in steps exists in the ACE repo at run time (no invented paths)
expectations.evidence: Agent explored the live repo and cited real line numbers (e.g. planner.js:267, runtimeConfig.js:32).

expectations.text: Steps reference the five files: lib/config/runtimeConfig.js, config/runtime-ops.json, graph/nodes/planner.js, graph/nodes/textWorker.js, services/profileMerge.js
expectations.evidence: All five files referenced across the numbered steps.

expectations.text: Includes shared header sections: Goal, Preconditions, AC to verification, Do not touch
expectations.evidence: Has Goal (L6) and 'Out of scope' (L368) but no Preconditions section (uses 'Pre-flight' instead) and no AC→verification table (uses a 'Decisions made up front' block instead).

expectations.text: Each ticket AC checkbox maps to at least one numbered step and at least one verification row
expectations.evidence: No explicit AC→step→verification mapping; coverage is implicit via numbered steps. Verification commands appear in Step 9 but aren't tied to specific ACs in a table.

expectations.text: No step contains a paste-ready full working implementation (sketches only, <=15 lines)
expectations.evidence: All code blocks are short sketches (registry entries, single assignments).

expectations.text: Includes Final verification section with the jest commands from the ticket
expectations.evidence: Step 9 'Run the verification suites' lists the three jest commands.

expectations.text: Header carries a stale-path regeneration warning
expectations.evidence: No regeneration/staleness warning anywhere in the file header.
